notes: All nine responses correctly identify the three-column Jan v0.8.2 Settings layout and the core right-panel content; none hallucinate (every error is an OCR misread like 'Anthropi(e)' or an omission of the ⌘N/⌘P/⌘K shortcuts and/or the truncated x.AI row). Only t0.4/rep0 and t0.1/rep2 and t0.7/rep1 capture the keyboard shortcuts; t0.4/rep0 alone also details the per-provider colored icons but is truncated mid-sentence. t0.7/rep0 is the weakest because it incorrectly asserts the top-right download/grid icons are absent.
